Package org.eventb.core.ast.tests.extension

Class TestExtensionTranslation

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.AbstractTests
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.extension.TestExtensionTranslation
public class TestExtensionTranslation extends AbstractTests
Unit tests for extension translation provided by ExtensionTranslation .
